subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Blessed Beauty! Thy letters have been received and their contents noted. Through the favours of the Ancient Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال ابهی مکاتیب شما واصل و بر مضمون اطلاع یافتیم از الطاف جمال قدم
subcodes.subjects: @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa], @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
